common.error: ❌ An error occurred while processing your command.
common.no_permission: ❌ You do not have permission to use this command.

curse.blocked: 🚫 You are cursed! No commands work for you...
curse.challenge:
🧩 **Trial of the Scribe in progress!**
You cannot use commands until you have successfully copied the following sentence:
`{phrase}`
curse.reversed_target: 🔄 **Command reversed!** {user}, you wanted to target someone but you are the target now! 😈
curse.reversed_failed: 🔄 Command inversion failed... You're lucky this time!
curse.reversed_general: 🔄 Command reversed! I'm doing the opposite of `{cmd}`... or nothing at all! 😈
curse.worst_luck: 💀 {user} is cursed! The outcome had to be the absolute worst... 😈

cursed_messages.cheat_detected:
🚫 **CHEAT ATTEMPT DETECTED** {user}!
Copy-pasting is strictly forbidden. You get a penalty of **5 extra minutes**! ⏲️
*(Wait at least 4 seconds before sending)*
cursed_messages.success_desc:
🎉 **{user}** successfully copied the sentence!

*The curse is lifted, you can speak again.*
cursed_messages.polite_mode: 🤵 **{user}**, mind your manners! A butler must start with "Sir," and end with "Yours faithfully".
cursed_messages.emoji_only: 😜 **{user}**, we only speak with emojis here! 😜

insults: Look, the resident looser {user} spoke again...
Idiot alert! {user} just made an appearance.
Again {user}... Even an Uno Reverse card couldn't save your dignity.
Oh no, {user} just polluted the chat...
praises: Make way for the great {user}, our lord! 🙌
Silence, our King {user} has spoken. Everyone listen!
Blessed be your name, {user}. This server is nothing without you.
👑 The KING {user} graces the channel with their presence!

presence.error_client: ❌ Client or user not available to set presence

help.title: 📚 Help Menu
help.welcome_desc: Use the dropdown menu below to navigate between categories.
help.category_desc: List of commands in the **{name}** category:

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Basic bot settings for this server. Change the command prefix or enable funny auto-responses (Auto-Feur).

players.title: Player Management
players.description: Define the server's special privileges. Kings are immune to bot effects, while Loosers are the primary targets for curses and draws.

welcome.title: Welcome System
welcome.description: Welcome new members automatically in the channel of your choice with a custom message.

security.title: Security & Anti-Raid
security.description: Protect your server against massive invasions. The system detects fast arrivals and takes automatic measures (Kick/Ban).

monitoring.title: Presence Monitoring
monitoring.description: Be notified as soon as certain members connect or disconnect. Ideal for not missing a friend's arrival or a watched Looser.

curses.title: Curses Management
curses.description: The bot has many fun curses (Voice mute, Spam, Text inversion, etc.). Disable the ones you find too intrusive here.

automates.title: Automated Messages
automates.description: Manage repetitive messages activated via the `!auto` command. You can stop them here without needing Discord commands.

youtube.title: Multi-Channel YouTube Notifications 📺
youtube.description: Alert your members as soon as one of your favorite channels publishes a new video. Enter an `@handle` or a YouTube link to add a channel.

audit.title: Audit Moderation Logs (v1.0.0)
audit.description: Automatically trace all crucial server actions. Modifications, deletions, and voice movements will be sent to a dedicated channel in real-time.
audit.privacy_warning: ⚠️ **Privacy**: Deleted or edited messages can be sensitive. Ensure only staff has access to this channel.

stats.title: Live Server Stats
stats.description: Display your server statistics in real-time in voice channel names (locked).
stats.note: Note: The bot will rename these channels automatically every 10 minutes.

vocal_temp.title: Temporary Voice Channels
vocal_temp.description: Automatically create private channels when a member joins a "Hub" channel.

tickets.title: Ticketing System
tickets.description: Allow members to open private support tickets with the team.
tickets.note: Use `!ticket-setup` on Discord to send the initial message.

index.title: Nexus Dashboard
index.desc: Take control of your Discord server with a modern, smooth, and intuitive interface. Configure your modules in a few clicks.

antiraid.no_admin: ❌ You must be an administrator to configure anti-raid!
antiraid.enabled_desc: The anti-raid system is now active!
antiraid.config_specify_option: ❌ Specify an option to configure! Use `!antiraid` to see the list.
antiraid.config_joinlimit_error: ❌ Join limit must be between 1 and 20!
antiraid.config_joinwindow_error: ❌ Time window must be at least 1 second!
antiraid.config_invalid_option: ❌ Invalid option! Use `!antiraid` to see available options.
antiraid.raid_unlock_instruction: Use `!antiraid off` then `!antiraid on` to unlock.

auto.description: Sends a message automatically every X seconds
auto.no_admin: ❌ You must be an administrator to use this command!
auto.no_active: ❌ No active automatic message in this channel!
auto.time_error: ❌ Time must be a number greater than or equal to 1 second!

clear.description: Deletes a specified number of messages (max 100)
clear.no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to manage messages!
clear.invalid_amount: ❌ **Error**: You must specify a valid number of messages to delete!
clear.limit_error: ❌ I can only delete up to 100 messages at once!
clear.old_messages_error: ❌ I can only delete messages that are less than 14 days old!

mute.description: Mutes a player in voice for a set duration (forced mute)
mute.no_duration:
❌ **Error**: You must specify a valid duration (in seconds)!
**Example**: `!mute @user 30`
mute.not_in_voice: ❌ {user} is not in a voice channel!
mute.already_muted_desc:
⏱️ **Time remaining**: {time} second(s)
💡 Wait for the current mute to end.
mute.confirm_desc:
✅ **{user}** has been muted!

⏱️ **Duration**: {duration} second(s)
🔓 **End**: <t:{endTime}:R>
⚠️ **Forced mute**: Cannot unmute yourself
👤 **By**: {by}
mute.confirm_footer: Any attempt to unmute will be penalized
mute.permission_error: ❌ Unable to mute the member. Check bot permissions.
mocking_messages: Did you really think you could escape? 😂

override.description: [KING ONLY] Force stop all active curses, mutes, and sanctions
override.no_king: 👑 This command is reserved for the KING of the server!
override.help_example2: `!override all all` - Stops everything for everyone
override.result_success: ✅ All sanctions have been cancelled by royal decree!

showdeleted.no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to see deleted messages!
showdeleted.unavailable: ❌ Deleted message tracking system is unavailable!

tickets.description: Sends the initial message for the ticket system
tickets.default_desc: Need help? Click the button below to open a private ticket with the team.
tickets.already_exists: ❌ You already have an open ticket: {channel}
tickets.welcome_desc:
Hello {user}, a team member will be available soon to help you.

Please describe your request below to speed up the process.

curse.description: Casts a random curse on a player with various effects
curse.hidden_footer: Message sent in private to remain hidden
curse.no_admin_clear: ❌ Only an administrator can lift curses!
curse.cleared_all: ✨ All curses have been lifted by **{user}**!
curse.list_desc: Here are all the unfortunate souls currently under a curse:
curse.no_voice_random: ❌ No players available in voice channels!
curse.mention_error: ❌ **Error**: You must mention a player or use `random`!
curse.examples:
**Examples**:
`!curse @player 60` - Curse a player for 60 seconds
`!curse random 30` - Curse a random player in voice for 30 seconds
`!curse list` - Show cursed players
`!curse clear` - Lift all curses (admin)
curse.duration_error: ❌ Duration must be a number greater than 0!
curse.disabled_error: ❌ Curse type `{type}` is disabled on this server!
curse.all_disabled_error: ❌ All curses are disabled on this server!
curse.hidden_confirm_closing: *The target doesn't know who cursed them... 😈*
curse.hidden_confirm_footer: Private message - No one else sees this
curse.lifted_desc:
🎉 **{user}** is free from the curse!

The {name} has ended.
curse.challenge_instr: *Chat and voice are blocked until you post it!*
shame_messages: 👻 Has anyone seen {user}? They're cursed lol
🤡 {user} thinks they can escape the curse
💀 {user} is a cursed player, avoid them!
random_responses: The answer is 42... or maybe not.
Have you tried turning it off and on again?
BEEP BOOP I am a robot 🤖
The answer is in your heart... or not.
I refuse to answer without my lawyer.
Type /help for... oh wait, that doesn't work for you.
challenge_phrases: Six slippery snails slid slowly seaward.
Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
How much wood would a woodchuck chuck if a woodchuck could chuck wood?
She sells seashells by the seashore.
The thirty-three thieves thought that they thrilled the throne throughout Thursday.
I saw Susie sitting in a shoeshine shop.
Toy boat, toy boat, toy boat.

PUBLIC_SHAME.name: Public Shame

GARBLED.desc: All messages are reversed or scrambled

MESSAGE_SCRAMBLER.desc: Your messages are rewritten with scrambled words

MESSAGE_OPPOSER.name: Opposer

CLOWN_MODE.name: Clown Mode

UWU_MODE.name: UwU Mode
UWU_MODE.desc: Your messages are transformed into UwU speak

CAPS_LOCK.name: CAPS LOCK

PIRATE_MODE.name: Pirate Mode
PIRATE_MODE.desc: Speak like a pirate you will, landlubber!

VOWEL_REMOVER.name: Vowel Remover
VOWEL_REMOVER.desc: ll vwls dspr frm yr mssgs

RANDOM_EMOJI.name: Random Emojis
RANDOM_EMOJI.desc: Words are replaced by weird emojis

CHALLENGE.name: Scribe's Trial
CHALLENGE.desc: Copy the complex phrase to lift the spell

SHY_MODE.name: Shy Mode
SHY_MODE.desc: Messages limited to 10 characters and truncated

QUESTIONER.name: Question Mark
QUESTIONER.desc: All messages must end with a question mark

minesweeper.title: 💣 FLASH MINESWEEPER
minesweeper.desc_initial: Find all free cells without touching the **{mines}** mines!
minesweeper.how_to_step1: - Click a **[ ? ]** button to reveal a cell.
minesweeper.how_to_step3: - 1️⃣, 2️⃣... = Number of mines in the 8 adjacent cells.
minesweeper.how_to_step4: - 💣 = MINE! The game stops if you hit one.
minesweeper.how_to_objective: *Goal: Reveal all cells that do not contain a mine.*
minesweeper.win_desc: Congratulations! You've successfully cleared the field!
minesweeper.lost_desc: You hit a mine at [{r}, {c}]! Better luck next time...

reaction.title: ⚡ REACTION TEST
reaction.wait_status: Get ready... The button will change! ⏳
reaction.false_start_desc: **{user}** clicked too early! The game is cancelled.

tictactoe.description: Starts a TicTacToe game (Solo vs bot or Multi)
tictactoe.title: ⭕ TIC TAC TOE ❌

states.desc: Solo push, no brain like Miguel

advices.text: Look at the minimap every 3 seconds
Play safe when you're the carry
Aim for the head, not the feet
Use your abilities at the right time
Buy skins only, it's a buff
Flash in place to assert dominance
Trashtalk in all chat to tilt the enemy
Play with your feet, it's more fun
Turn off sound, play on instinct
Turn off your PC, go outside

states.desc: W, A, S or D have left the chat
Spider web impact in the middle
Rage quit with a blunt object
